member.name: T:MonadicSharp.Azure.Functions.HttpRequestDataExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for deserializing Azure Functions HTTP request bodies into values.

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Azure.Functions.HttpRequestDataExtensions.ReadFromJsonAsync``1(Microsoft.Azure.Functions.Worker.Http.HttpRequestData,System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions)
member.summary: Reads and deserializes the request body as . Returns Result.Failure if the body is empty or cannot be deserialized.

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Azure.Functions.HttpRequestDataExtensions.ReadAndValidateAsync``1(Microsoft.Azure.Functions.Worker.Http.HttpRequestData,System.Func{``0,MonadicSharp.Result{``0}},System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions)
member.summary: Reads and deserializes the request body, then applies to the deserialized value. Combines deserialization and domain validation in one step.

member.name: T:MonadicSharp.Azure.Functions.HttpResponseDataExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for converting to Azure Functions , with automatic error-to-HTTP-status mapping.

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Azure.Functions.HttpResponseDataExtensions.ToHttpResponseAsync``1(System.Threading.Tasks.Task{MonadicSharp.Result{``0}},Microsoft.Azure.Functions.Worker.Http.HttpRequestData,System.Net.HttpStatusCode)
member.summary: Awaits the result and writes an HTTP response. Success → with the value serialized as JSON. Failure → mapped HTTP status with a body.

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Azure.Functions.HttpResponseDataExtensions.ToHttpResponseAsync``1(MonadicSharp.Result{``0},Microsoft.Azure.Functions.Worker.Http.HttpRequestData,System.Net.HttpStatusCode)
member.summary: Writes an HTTP response from a . Success → with the value serialized as JSON. Failure → mapped HTTP status with a body.

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Azure.Functions.HttpResponseDataExtensions.ToHttpResponseAsync(System.Threading.Tasks.Task{MonadicSharp.Result{MonadicSharp.Unit}},Microsoft.Azure.Functions.Worker.Http.HttpRequestData,System.Net.HttpStatusCode)
member.summary: Awaits and writes an HTTP response for Result<Unit> (command operations). Success → 204 No Content. Failure → mapped HTTP status with a body.

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Azure.Functions.HttpResponseDataExtensions.ToCreatedResponseAsync``1(System.Threading.Tasks.Task{MonadicSharp.Result{``0}},Microsoft.Azure.Functions.Worker.Http.HttpRequestData,System.Func{``0,System.String})
member.summary: Creates a 201 Created response with the value and an optional Location header.
